calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-14-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk Nicole Olcomendy, Reporter Beldon Yee.

Parties present John Street attorney for plaintiff, defendants Wolfgang Molke and Inge Molke in pro per.

Case settled, the terms of the settlement to be as follows:
Plaintiff is to recover restitution and possession of the premises at 1632-C Market Street, San Francisco, CA. Defendant is to pay $11,471.93 back rent, $171 costs and $750 in attorneys fees to plaintiff. A stay of execution for 10 days from today will be in effect.
